name: Pork Scalloppine W/Cranberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless pork loin cutlets, pounded to 1/4-inch thickness
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Dredge each cutlet in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
3. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat. Add cutlets and cook, turning once, until browned.
4. Arrange cutlets on a serving platter. Drizzle with some of the heated sauce.
5. For the sauce: In a small saucepan, combine vinegar and sugar. Cook until sugar dissolves.
6. Add stock and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. In a skillet, sauté onion in butter until browned.
8. Stir in flour, then gradually whisk in the stock mixture.
9. Bring to a boil and cook for 5 more minutes.
10. Stir in cranberries and liqueur, then simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Servings: 4
Preparation Time: 10 minutes
Cooking Time: 20 minutes
